package rulecoverage

func PositiveSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExports() string {
    ruleID := "shared_package_named_common_base_utils_with_mixed_exports"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Generic packages that mix services, models, DTOs, validators, and queries behind one broad shared namespace."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
